title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

title: Meet the Team | Ashby
text:
Meet the Team | Ashby

## Team

# We're a nimble team of humans working together to do big things.

Ashby is a remote-first company with colleagues working from 24 different countries in North America, South America, Europe, and Asia. We host an annual company-wide gathering, along with individual team meetups each year.

Our 2022 holiday book exchange 🎄

Department

AllLeadershipCustomer SuccessCustomer SupportDataDesignEngineeringMarketingQuality AssuranceSalesFinancePeople and Talent AcquisitionProduct

##### Kaitlyn Crawley

🇺🇸

Engineering

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I designed and built our HRIS integrations with Rippling and BambooHR. Instead of manually copying data on hired candidates from Ashby to their HRIS, customers can do it with the click of a button!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I built a script that enabled our team to import our customers' candidate data from CSV files. It's enabled us to work with technology partners and recruiting firms that haven't yet integrated with Ashby.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The flexibility and breadth of the product was definitely something that surprised me when I joined Ashby. I was impressed by all of the existing capabilities of the product, and I'm excited to help expand and improve on what we've already built!

Show more

##### Benjamin Encz

🇺🇸

Co-founder & CEO

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I've designed and created some of the early building blocks we use to build new features (think Legos). It's been great to see the team embrace this way of building and watch the building blocks evolve without my help!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I've built and continue to expand the internal knowledge base of our industry and our customers. It's critical to help the team make independent product and engineering decisions.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The team has consistently focused on the long term even as I've stepped away

Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

title: BambooHR Careers | Come grow with us
text:
BambooHR Careers | Come grow with us

# Welcome to BambooHR Careers

We make game-changing HR software that sets people free to do great work! If you're passionate about doing meaningful work with friendly, talented people, check out the career opportunities at BambooHR, and apply to join us.

View Open Positions

Style

BG bottom cap 5, gray gradient

## What sets BambooHR apart?

## Our mission

Our mission is to set people free to do great work, and that includes everybody—ourselves, our teams, and our customers!

## Our vision

Our vision is to become the #1 HR platform for businesses of all sizes around the world. We get there by building an awesome product, always having our customers’ backs, and delivering exceptional HR experiences—in our product and beyond.

## Our values

Our values inform everything we do at BambooHR—they set the standard for how we communicate and act. We’re proud of how our values guide the way we do business and interact with our customers and each other every day.

Learn More

## Our history

Founded in 2008, BambooHR started with the goal of building a great place to work and creating innovative HR tools to help every business do the same. We’ve grown a lot since then, but these founding principles still drive us forward.

## Living our unique values

### Grow from Good to Great

From the very beginning, BambooHR has been determined to create a better business and product, in a better way. We believe in intentional and exceptional growth—for ourselves, our product, and our company—and we’re never satisfied with the status quo.

### Enjoy Quality of Life

We care about doing quality work and showing up for our team and customers, and we make time for our families, friends, and communities. Home life, work life—it’s all life! And we strive to live it well.

### Make It Count

We believe making our time here count is how we grow from good to great and enjoy a high quality of life. Hard work and sustained focus got us here, and it’s the

Placeholder text for "read time" DO NOT REMOVE

Much like code, an engineering interview can’t contain any bugs - it must be built correctly. So, what does a good interview process look like to an engineer, and how do you get there?

In this Hiring Hacks webinar Matt Sherman, Engineering Manager at Stack Overflow, takes you through the company’s technical interview process. Learn the stages and tools Stack Overflow uses to effectively assess technical talent while maintaining a positive candidate experience for engineers (hint: stay away from whiteboarding).

In this webinar, you’ll learn:

- How to build a recruiting culture among your engineers
- How Stack Overflow evaluates candidates’ technical and non-technical skills
- How supporting remote work is a competitive recruiting advantage
- What Stack Overflow’s technical hiring process looks like

Filed under:

Candidate sourcing

January 12, 2020

title: Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters
text:
Shiran Yaroslavsky | SmartRecruiters

# Shiran Yaroslavsky

## Senior Vice President, Product

Shiran is the Senior Vice President, Product at SmartRecruiters. With a rich background in product leadership and entrepreneurship in HR Technology, Shiran has a track record of managing large-scale products and cross-functional global teams.

Before joining SmartRecruiters, Shiran held leadership roles at HiBob as VP of Product and was the Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder of Cassiopeia, a company she successfully led to its acquisition by HiBob.

Recognized for her achievements, she was featured in the 2019 Forbes 30Under30 list. Shiran holds Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Law (both Cum Laude) and an MBA from The University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

title: "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
"Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor

Jan 30, 2026

# "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment

Nadezda Muttonen, Regita Kumel, and Triin Kimer, People & Culture Team, ESTO

Discover how Regita Kumel and the ESTO team are proving that lightning-fast recruitment can still feel incredibly personal, creating a 21-day hiring journey where every candidate - hired or not - walks away feeling like a winner.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

In the high-stakes world of FinTech, the Baltic company ESTO stands out - not just for its record-breaking revenue growth, but for its approach to the people behind the numbers. Headquartered in Tallinn, ESTO has grown into a 100-person powerhouse by connecting 6,000+ merchants with innovative consumer finance solutions. But as any fast-growth company knows, scaling the business requires scaling the team and culture.

We sat down with Regita Kumel, Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, to discuss how they moved away from modules that didn't keep up with the companies fast growth, to embrace a recruitment process that is as intuitive and data-driven as the financial products they build.

Talent & Employer Branding Manager, ESTO

## Meet Regita Kumel

Regita is the Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, bringing a wealth of experience from both HR agencies and in-house roles at high-growth companies. Specializing in the Fintech, e-commerce, and service sectors, she focuses on bridging the gap between strategic recruitment and authentic employer branding.

### The Need for a Centralized Hub

Teamtailor: Before Teamtailor, what were the "growing pains" in your recruitment process?

highlights:
"Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor

Jan 30, 2026

# "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment

Nadezda Muttonen, Regita Kumel, and Triin Kimer, People & Culture Team, ESTO

Discover how Regita Kumel and the ESTO team are proving that lightning-fast recruitment can still feel incredibly personal, creating a 21-day hiring journey where every candidate - hired or not - walks away feeling like a winner.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

In the high-stakes world of FinTech, the Baltic company ESTO stands out - not just for its record-breaking revenue growth, but for its approach to the people behind the numbers. Headquartered in Tallinn, ESTO has grown into a 100-person powerhouse by connecting 6,000+ merchants with innovative consumer finance solutions. But as any fast-growth company knows, scaling the business requires scaling the team and culture.

We sat down with Regita Kumel, Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, to discuss how they moved away from modules that didn't keep up with the companies fast growth, to embrace a recruitment process that is as intuitive and data-driven as the financial products they build.

Talent & Employer Branding Manager, ESTO

## Meet Regita Kumel

Regita is the Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, bringing a wealth of experience from both HR agencies and in-house roles at high-growth companies. Specializing in the Fintech, e-commerce, and service sectors, she focuses on bridging the gap between strategic recruitment and authentic employer branding.

### The Need for a Centralized Hub

Teamtailor: Before Teamtailor, what were the "growing pains" in your recruitment process?

Regita: We were using a basic recruitment module, but it lacked the centralization we needed. Managers couldn’t independently track their own processes, and we didn’t have a way to build a long-term talent pool. We needed a platform that was flexible and intuitive - s

title: Let's Talk: Remote Hiring
text:
Teamtailor Presents: HR Pulse, a Remote Hiring webinar
# Let's Talk: Remote Hiring
Join us as we delve deep into the intricacies of remote hiring for Teamtailor's HR Pulse Webinar. Our expert speakers, industry pioneers, and seasoned HR professionals are here to equip you with the tools, insights, and strategies needed to thrive in the digital age of recruitment.
Register Here!
![](https://www.teamtailor.com/assets/api/marketing-site-images/file/HRPULSE_LOGO-1220x504.png)
## Webinar Details
* Wednesday, June 12th, 2024
* 11am PST | 1pm CDT | 2pm EST
* Zoom Webinar
![]()
## What is HR Pulse?
🎯**Tailored Insights:**Gain valuable insights tailored specifically to the challenges and opportunities of remote hiring.
🌐**Global Perspectives:**Explore diverse perspectives from thought leaders across the globe, offering a comprehensive understanding of remote recruitment trends.
💡**Innovative Strategies:**Discover innovative strategies and best practices to streamline your remote hiring process, ensuring efficiency and success.
🔑**Key Learnings:**Uncover key learnings and actionable takeaways that you can implement immediately to elevate your remote recruitment game.
## Our Speakers
![]()
## Stacey Slater
## Senior Manager of Talent, Programs and Operations, Oyster
Stacey is no stranger to global hiring! With nearly a decade in Talent Acquisition, she's expanded teams at Nexmo, Onfido, and Messagebird and now spearheads Oyster’s global TA team to actualize remote hiring visions. As Senior Manager of Talent, Programs, and Operations at Oyster, Stacey is the driving force behind Oyster's hiring strategies and talent programs. With a focus on TA Strategy and leading their Global Talent Acquisition team, she's committed to revolutionizing remote hiring!

![]()

## Founder & CEO, GroWrk
Carlos Escutia is the founder and CEO of GroWrk, a leading and global tec

title: Greenhouse | Life at Greenhouse
text:
Greenhouse | Life at Greenhouse

Scroll Subnavigation

Life at Greenhouse

# A mission you can believe in

At Greenhouse, we come together to help make everyone great at hiring. Our foundational commitment to collaboration, communication and connection unites a community of remote team members around the globe.

## Life-work balance

We embrace diversity in thought, culture and location. We support full-time employees wherever they are in the world, so they can show up to work as their best, most authentic selves.

Work seamlessly between your home office and our optional coworking space membership.

Enjoy the benefits of our Global Passport program, so you can enjoy a temporary office from anywhere.

Access flexible PTO as well as company holidays to rest and recharge.

## Our take on employee resource groups (ERGs)

We call our ERGs “Arbors,” because in the same way trees provide our environment with oxygen, our Arbors enrich our work with inclusion, diversity, equity and allyship, so we can all grow together.

## Current Arbors offer support and community for the following group, and we’re always growing:

### Blackhouse

Connects, encourages and supports Black employees through a safe and supportive community

### Fullhouse

Advocates for a culture of awareness and support for all caregivers

### Jadehouse

Connects Asian-identifying and Pacific Islander-identifying employees through a safe and supportive community

### Rainbowhouse

Works to create safe, welcoming environments for LGBTQ+ employees and their allies to support internal networking and mentorship opportunities

### Trellis

Advocates and provides resources for fostering an environment where Greenhouse employees with mental and physical health conditions can thrive

### Verde

Connects and encourages Latinx/Hispanic employees and allies through a safe and supportive community

### WomenGrow

Brings visibility to the intersectionality of women at Greenhouse and promotes an inclusive and more supporti

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Premier vice-président, Ingénierie

Michał dirige la fonction d’ingénierie de SmartRecruiters et est responsable du développement de logiciels, de l’infrastructure et de la sécurité.

Michał a passé les 15 dernières années à construire des systèmes distribués et à gérer des équipes d’ingénieurs dans diverses industries. Il a rejoint SmartRecruiter en 2012 comme l’un des premiers employés et a aidé à faire évoluer la plateforme pour répondre aux besoins de certaines des plus grandes entreprises du monde.

Il est passionné par la création d’organisations d’ingénierie où les équipes sont habilitées à produire des résultats commerciaux.

Michal est titulaire d’une maîtrise en informatique de l’université Jagiellonian.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Lehua Stonebraker

Senior Vice President, People

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Steve Hardy

##### Robert Symons

Vice-président exécutif, Partenariats et développement

##### Michał Nowak

##### Shiran Yaroslavsky

Senior Vice President, Product

##### Alison Bosch

Premier vice-président, Opérations et chef de cabinet

## Dive deeper with valuable insights

Guide

Download our guide on AI-driven hiring.

Webinar

### The Future of Hiring Success

Join industry experts for an in-depth look at AI and recruitment.

Article

Read our latest article on leveraging automation in hiring.

title: Bri Fredriksen — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Bri Fredriksen — Author at Lever | Lever

# Bri Fredriksen

Content & Social Media Manager

Bri Fredriksen believes good content must be two things: worth reading (not just skimming) and worth acting on. At Employ, she develops content that helps teams navigate hiring challenges and focus on what works, what's next, and what's possible. Her approach blends thoughtful storytelling with a practical understanding of how people read, learn, and make decisions.

## Articles by Bri

14 articles published

AI & Technology Future of Recruiting

## From Credentials to Capability: Why Skills-Based Hiring Is Replacing Resumes

In a recent webinar, Employ’s Michelle Stone and Katy Jenkins sat down with Nathan Mondragon (ProboTalent) and Adriana Gamboa (IBM) to unpack this shift—and share what hiring looks like when resumes are no longer recruiters’ most trusted signal.

June 3, 2026

Future of Recruiting Hiring Strategy

## Across the Generational Divide: A Look at What Different Generations Expect from the Hiring Process

Learn what different generations expect from employers today—from flexibility and communication to AI transparency and hiring experience.

May 27, 2026

AI & Technology Future of Recruiting

## What the Rise in AI-Powered Candidate Fraud Really Means for TA Teams

Candidate fraud is evolving fast. Learn how talent leaders are detecting risk, redefining screening, and building trust into modern hiring.

May 11, 2026

## Filtering Out the Fraud: How to Recognize Fake Candidates During the Hiring Process

TL; DR You might be about to hire a fake candidate and not even know it. To help you filter out the fraud, we’ve aggregated the top ten tells you’re talking to a fake candidate, […]

April 17, 2026

## How to Build a Recruitment Marketing Strategy That Actually Connects

TL; DR If your pipeline is growing, why aren’t your hires improving? Here’s the thing: With fewer qualified candidates and lower screen-to-interview rates, the challenge isn’t attracting more a

title: DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Integraatiomme tuovat supervoimaa rekrytointiisi

## DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent UK job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by over 900 UK companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.uk to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.uk, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the UK – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 35 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 900 companies, including Metro Bank, UK Home Office, and McLaren, fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.uk Support article: Read more about this package
